resumeReason2: User issued 'go' — retry aborted Batch 6 suites

completedSuites.notes: P0 bug: double-click creates duplicate orders. 7 BLOCKED — canonical decline card no longer declines in this env.
VCST-4728 breadcrumb regression PASS. CAT-040/041/049 FAIL on systemic SEO defect (empty meta description, no canonical, no JSON-LD). CAT-037 SKIPPED — /Brands has no count badges in Coffee theme.
Order CO260504-00032 placed E2E via CyberSource. SMK-015 GA4 purchase event AMBIGUOUS (network buffer reset). PR #2234 data-test-id renames verified deployed.
Pagination tests N/A — storefront uses infinite_scroll mode. Test fixture PROD_DEFAULT.sku=WH-001 is stale; used live SKU BAJ-18974454 instead.

Critical bug: PDP shows €0.00 placeholder when no EUR price list (misleading 'free' presentation). NOTE: cat 002 confirmed virtual catalog filter still uses OLD `fc596540...` ID (returns 4,131 products) — memory `9238c387...` may be outdated, recommend verification.

Core search filters healthy. Cross-layer probe verified ($54 Vintage Colorado Hoodie matches GraphQL API). Search→cart E2E PASS. 2 bugs: 'Show in stock' default state, i18n key leak in mobile aria-label.

Critical org-isolation invariants verified PASS (cart, addresses, branding, search, XSS prevention). 1 FAIL: org switch from deep category doesn't reset navigation. 11 BLOCKED on test-data gaps (no contract-pricing differential, no org-scoped lists, no ≤10-org user, no default addresses, no no-default-org account).

List lifecycle works. BUG-007-001 (High): 'Anyone (readonly)' sharing locks all editable fields permanently. Saved-for-later 'Add to cart' copies rather than moves. Email-share UI doesn't exist. 7 BLOCKED — slot 3 is sole BuildRight user (no paired user for cross-user shared-list tests).

Core RBAC + member CRUD PASS (list, search, invite, edit-role, block/unblock). 6 BLOCKED on missing admin-SPA access + approval-workflow not configured on org. BUG-008-001: /company/members has no member count anywhere on page.

Variations + configurations both healthy. VCST-4586 (sale price primary) + VCST-4612 (no auto-scroll on radio) regressions confirmed PASS. 3 prelim bugs: mobile swatches <44×44 WCAG, no default variant on 4-axis product, variant selection not in URL.

Address-management flow works (CRUD + mobile + Canadian provinces + XSS). 4 bugs: no default-address UI, weak ZIP/phone validation, duplicate-address not deduped (server-side), bulk-order qty cap bypass.

Email validator accepts user@domain without TLD (Low — likely intentional permissive validator). 6 cases skipped (chrome-required), 2 N/A in CSV, 1 Firefox limitation. Cross-references BUG-041-001/BUG-002-001 noted, not re-filed.

Real B2B order CO260505-00020 ($275.99) placed via CyberSource — math invariant BL-CHK-006 verified ($100 − $20.01 + $46 + $150 = $275.99). 1 High bug: PO Number field missing. 7 BLOCKED on Net-30/approval-workflow/contract-pricing seed gaps.

Order CO260505-00018 ($1,800) via Authorize.Net E2E. **BUG-041-001 P0 NOT reproduced** — single order confirmed. Defect #2 (city facet→postal codes) FIXED. Defects #1,#3,#4 still present (#3+#4 newly filed).

Order list, detail, search, pagination, status/payment display all PASS. BUG-041-001 P0 duplicate orders CO260504-00029/30 confirmed visible in /account/orders. 32 BLOCKED on absent order statuses (Shipped/Completed/Cancelled/Returned) + admin-mutation prereqs. 3 new bugs: Reorder button absent (High), SKU missing on line items (Med), i18n key 'commmon.buttons.search_orders' typo (Low).

RFQ-from-cart creation, qty edits, search, sort, status-gated action buttons all PASS. 20 BLOCKED on missing seed quotes (Received/Accepted/Rejected/Expired states + multi-round negotiation). CSV terminology stale ('Request Quote' vs current 'Add cart items to quote'). Cleanup: RFQ260505-00002 (Processing) + RFQ260505-00003 (empty draft) need admin cancel.

Revenue-critical paths PASS: add/qty/remove/persist/totals/currency. VCST-4896 coupons-sidebar PASS end-to-end (preset cap, custom code, radio replace, trash cancel, view-all _blank, i18n de). 1 Medium bug: negative qty (-1) UI desync (server clamps to 1, UI shows -1).

All 15 executable cases PASS. 17 BLOCKED pre-flagged in CSV (13 admin-destructive, 4 seed-required). VCST-4896 coupons-sidebar PASS (5% × $576.98 = $28.85). Cart persistence across sign-out/sign-in PASS. Guest-cart merge PASS. 3 observations (no bugs filed): invalid coupon silently removes valid one, over-stock UI accepts 9999 without auto-cap, sign-in route needs cache-buster on first visit.

VCST-4691 character-pattern coverage PASS (HTML/script tags rejected in name fields; & allowed in org name). Auth security posture solid (no enumeration, case-insensitive email, Unicode preserved). Same email no-TLD issue as BUG-012-001 — filed as BUG-031-001. 7 BLOCKED on admin-config + missing seeds (LOCKOUT_TEST_* env empty).

bugs.title: Search dropdown not restored to Hints state after Clear (X) click
Search typo tolerance / 'Did you mean' not implemented
PDP shows €0.00 placeholder for product with no price list in selected currency (misleading 'free' presentation)
Category page has no pagination — only ~25-32 of 146 products reachable
'Show in stock' checkbox unchecked by default contradicts SRCH-NEW-012 expected state
Raw i18n key `common.labels.close` exposed as aria-label on mobile search backdrop
Org switch from deep category page does not reset URL/breadcrumbs (only branding updates)
List with 'Anyone (readonly)' sharing locks all editable fields permanently — cannot rename, change description, revert sharing, or save
/company/members page has no member count display
Variant swatches measure 32×32px on mobile (below WCAG 44×44 touch target)
4-axis variation product loads with no default variant pre-selected (Add-to-Cart disabled)
Variant attribute selection does not propagate to URL query params (no shareable variant URLs)
No default-address UI — `isDefault: false` on every record; checkout/header don't pre-select
Address ZIP `999` and phone `123` accepted and saved without validation
Server inserts duplicate address instead of dedupe (PROPOSED-BL-PROFILE-001 violation)
Bulk-order qty cap (max 7) is cosmetic — line accepted at 166
PO Number field missing from B2B checkout for org user
Email validator accepts `user@domain` without TLD (likely permissive SMTP validator)
Address popup aria-label='Search pickup locations' misleading (used for shipping addresses too)
Mobile city facet clipped 27px past 375px viewport
Reorder button absent on every order detail page (blocks 11 reorder-flow cases)
Raw i18n key `commmon.buttons.search_orders` (3 m's typo) exposed on search button
Line items missing SKU display on order detail page
Negative qty (-1) input persists in UI/header but server clamps to 1 — UI/state desync
Sign-up email validator accepts `missing@domain` without TLD (same root cause as BUG-012-001)
